narrative:
Precinct South Point 1 (precinct in Lawrence County) has 419 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.6 percentage points.
